validators.name: local repository quality gate
validators.summary: Unit, race, reproducible build, process smoke, Python, JSON, link, private-evaluation tracking, sensitive-content, and migration-aware historical rollback checks passed.

validators.name: public synthetic retrieval comparison
validators.summary: The schema-validated public fixture distinguishes the four baseline policies and rejects its stale and cross-tenant cases. It is a contract smoke test, not production-quality evidence.

validators.name: public exact-basis GitHub workflow
validators.summary: GitHub Actions run 29726147010 checked out basis commit a9a971cff16ee50ab4fafca3a475f117a47f438d and passed repository validation, PostgreSQL durability, the pinned live-Qdrant lifecycle, and the clean-host observability rehearsal.

validators.name: public live Qdrant lifecycle
validators.summary: The exact-basis workflow proved collection creation, first alias creation, atomic replacement through the required guard interface, blue-green readback, guarded rollback, query, deletion, and cleanup against digest-pinned Qdrant v1.18.2. PostgreSQL guard serialization was proven in a separate integration gate; no composed test is claimed.

validators.name: immutable public closure candidate review
validators.summary: Protocol v2 requires a separate review of the exact candidate commit before Sprint 10 can be authorized.

acceptance.criterion: semantic and lexical results remain untrusted candidates until canonical resolution
tenant, repository, lifecycle, freshness, source commit, and source hash boundaries fail closed
Qdrant projection can be rebuilt and its serving alias can be cut over or rolled back safely
private four-baseline evaluation can run without exposing labels to the runtime
production and AMD competition retrieval quality is accepted

unresolved_validation: private tuning, holdout, OOD, leakage, stale, and adversarial evaluation owned by Sprint 10
